expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transitions PROJ-456 to list available transitions FIRST
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows: 'jira.mjs transitions PROJ-456' as the first command, before any transition or comment.

expectations.text: Does NOT guess or hardcode a transition ID
expectations.evidence: Step 2 uses '<transition-id-for-Done>' as a placeholder, explicitly stating the ID comes from Step 1. Section 2 explains why: 'Transition IDs are not universal' and 'Always list transitions first to get the correct ID -- don't guess.'

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs transition PROJ-456 <id> with the ID from transitions list
Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-456 with the deployment message
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows: 'jira.mjs comment PROJ-456 "Deployed to production in release v2.3.1"'.
